title: Farmers' Galore
description: The best modpack for builders and farmers!
body:
![Farmers' Galore Full Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de0e672bbde24b0735692a09b96f35fe007167d0.png)

## The perfect modpack made for the builders and farmers of minecraft! 💜
### Built around Farmer's Delight, we have added many mods to improve the experience of the base mod!
# 
### 🖥️ Specs Tested:

**GPUs:**
- RTX 3070 (150~ FPS W/Shaders)
- RTX 2060 (80~ FPS W/Shaders)
- GTX 1070 (15~ FPS W/Shaders)
  
**CPUs:**
- AMD Ryzen 7 5800x
- AMD Ryzen 7 3700X
- Intel(R) Core(TM) i3-10100F

### 💻 (Singleplayer Tested) RAM to allocate:
- Recommend: 8 GB

- Best Performance: 10 GB

### ⏳ Future Verisons of MC?
Currently, we won't be able to update the modpack due to many reasons. The most simple way to put it, most mods aren't updated!

### 🔨 Forge Version?
No Forge or Neo-Forge versions in development. The mods that are in this modpack could run in Forge but at the moment I do not want to port this to Forge.
